description_long: This rifle features a robust wooden stock with a thumbhole design, providing ergonomic support for the shooter. The receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from dark metal, giving the weapon a sturdy and utilitarian appearance. A detachable box magazine is fitted beneath the receiver, allowing for quick reloading. The rifle is equipped with iron sights, including a front post and a rear notch, for precise aiming. The fore-end and buttstock display a natural wood grain pattern, contrasting with the matte black finish of the metal components. The overall design suggests a practical, reliable firearm suitable for urban or tactical scenarios.
description: A wood-and-metal rifle with a thumbhole stock, detachable box magazine, and iron sights, blending natural wood grain with matte black metal parts.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barrel's end, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the wooden stock.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thumbhole wooden stock, detachable box magazine, and the full length of the barrel with iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the thumbhole stock, magazine, and the metal receiver with visible iron sights.
